name: sheet
title: Sheet
description: Accessible slide-out dialog anchored to any edge, with header, footer, and close slots.

props.name: side
props.description: Edge the sheet is anchored to. On SheetContent.

props.name: showClose
props.description: Render the built-in top-right close button. On SheetContent.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Fired on open and on every dismissal path — close button, overlay click, and Escape. On Sheet.

clinicalNotes: A sheet traps focus and returns it to its trigger on close, which is what makes it safe for a side task (notes, assistant, filters) launched from a chart. It is dismissible three ways — close button, overlay click, Escape — so never let a sheet be the only place unsaved clinical data lives: a stray Escape must not silently discard a drafted note or an unreviewed order. Guard those flows in onOpenChange.
notes: Wraps Radix Dialog via the radix-ui package. Animations come from tw-animate-css.
